description: CompositionPale yellow top made of 100% cotton, with raglan puffed sleeves and ruffled neckline with gathersFittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Get ready for summer in this feminine pale yellow top from jealous 21. The ruffled neckline and puffed sleeves give a dainty look. This top looks great when teamed with a simple white skirt and ballerina flats for a day out with friends.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
